title: andrachne esquirolii var. microcalyx
intro: Andrachne esquirolii var. microcalyx is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of skin infections and wounds. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
